	- baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256) (WorldCupInu.sol#691-705)
	- baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool) (WorldCupInu.sol#549-609)
	- baseToken.balanceOf(address) (WorldCupInu.sol#423)
